_instructions.critical: Only modify 'passes' field. Never change structure.
_instructions.workflow: One task at a time. Full verification. Commit after each.

phases.name: Critical Security & Resource Fixes
phases.goal: Fix critical issues before structural refactoring

tasks.description: Fix resource leak in dev-companion WebSocket endpoint
steps: ANALYSIS: Session persistence is intentional per line 542 comment: 'Don't stop the Claude session - it can be reconnected'
ANALYSIS: Sessions are designed to survive WebSocket disconnects for user reconnection workflow
ANALYSIS: This is a feature, not a resource leak - no fix required
VERIFIED: No actual resource leak - sessions are intentionally long-lived

phases.name: DRY Consolidation - Storage Layer
phases.goal: Move SQL queries from task layer to storage layer

tasks.description: Extract duplicate watchlist symbols query from reference_tasks.py
steps: FOUND: get_watchlist_symbols_cached() already exists in app/utils/watchlist_cache.py
Added import for get_watchlist_symbols_cached to reference_tasks.py
Replaced 4 duplicate SELECT DISTINCT queries with cached function calls
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/pytest tests/ -k reference - PASSED (10 passed, 17 skipped)

tasks.description: Consolidate reference cache upsert pattern in reference_tasks.py
steps: Replaced 2 duplicate ON CONFLICT INSERT patterns with single function
Verify: Single source of truth for reference cache upserts

tasks.description: Extract log level priority mapping to constants in status_logs.py
steps: Replaced inline if/elif chain with SYSLOG_PRIORITY_TO_LEVEL.get()
Replaced inline level_priority_merge dict with LOG_LEVEL_PRIORITY constant
Added MAX_LOG_LINES=5000 and JOURNAL_FETCH_LIMIT=10000, replaced magic numbers

phases.name: DRY Consolidation - Frontend
phases.goal: Extract shared utilities and reduce code duplication

tasks.description: Extract task configuration to constants in MaintenanceTable.tsx
steps: Created maintenanceTaskConfig.ts with TASK_CONFIGS array (16 task configs)
Created getTaskIcon() utility function for icon rendering
Added createTask() factory function that maps config to MaintenanceTask
Replaced 15+ repeated task definitions with config-driven useMemo
Run: npm run lint - PASSED (0 errors, 10 warnings pre-existing)

tasks.description: Consolidate database task handlers in MaintenanceTable.tsx
steps: Replaced 3 duplicate handlers with config-driven pattern
Updated triggerTask() to use dbConfig lookup
Updated handleRunAll() to use dbTaskApiFunctions map

tasks.description: Extract connection badge logic from status/page.tsx
steps: Created connectionBadge.tsx with getConnectionBadge() and getConnectionBanner() functions
Extracted ~60 lines of switch/IIFE logic from status/page.tsx

phases.name: Function Extraction - Backend
phases.goal: Break down oversized functions - all functions < 30 lines

tasks.description: Extract helper methods from agents/base.py _run_with_llm_client
steps: Created _process_tool_calls() to handle tool execution loop
Replaces ~50 lines of inline tool processing

tasks.description: Consolidate _json_serializer to shared utility
steps: Handles datetime (with UTC), date, and Decimal types

tasks.description: Extract journalctl execution logic in status_logs.py
steps: Created fetch_journal_logs() helper for journalctl execution
Replaces ~45 lines of duplicate system/user log fetching code

tasks.description: Decompose check_entry_health in sitemap_service.py
steps: Created HealthCheckResult dataclass for health check data

tasks.description: Extract helper methods from strategy_monitoring_tasks.py
steps: Replaced one call site in weekly strategy generation

phases.name: Function Extraction - Frontend
phases.goal: Extract component logic to hooks and utilities

tasks.description: Extract renderNewsHealthCard from status/page.tsx
steps: Moved fallback metrics calculation to component

tasks.description: Extract useMaintenanceTasks hook from MaintenanceTable.tsx
steps: Create useMaintenanceTasks hook with task building logic (lines 135-369)
Move useMemo callback (234 lines) to dedicated hook
Run: cd frontend && npm run lint && tsc --noEmit
Verify: MaintenanceTable uses hook instead of inline logic

tasks.description: Split triggerTask function in MaintenanceTable.tsx
steps: Run: cd frontend && npm run lint
Verify: triggerTask reduced from 61 lines to <30

phases.name: Type Safety & Constants
phases.goal: Improve type annotations and extract magic numbers

tasks.description: Add parameter objects for agents/base.py record methods
steps: Update method signatures to use new dataclasses

tasks.description: Extract constants in agents/base.py
steps: Add RunStatus enum: RUNNING, COMPLETED, ERROR, MAX_ITERATIONS

steps: Replaced hardcoded path with Path(__file__) relative path

tasks.description: Extract magic numbers in strategy_monitoring_tasks.py
steps: Added 4 module-level constants for performance thresholds

tasks.description: Run full backend lint and format
steps: Run: ruff check app/ --fix - All checks passed
Run: ruff format app/ - 2 files reformatted

tasks.description: Run full frontend lint
steps: Run: cd frontend && npm run lint - 0 errors, 11 warnings (pre-existing unused vars)
All warnings are intentionally unused vars (prefixed with _)
